The '''bol''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of mammal native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. It was used primarily to produce [[Milk/Legends|milk]], but also was a popular mount even outside of Dantooine. They were often hunted for their hide; however, due to over-hunting the population of bols was in steady decline. The hunting originated from the [[Mining Outpost (Dantooine)|Dantooine Mining Outpost]], where thousands of hunters and creature handlers gathered to hunt bols or to tame them. The bols usually frequented an area about a mile away from the outpost, so the hunters did not have to go far to kill them and destroy their homes. Bols produced [[Milk/Legends|milk]].

Bols could be domesticated by skilled [[Beastmaster/Legends|beast masters]] and used as mounts for transportation.<ref name="SWG:P4">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other|Publish 4}}</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Bol_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Bols appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Bols were made craftable mounts for players with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 4 Notes: 13 November 03|Publish 4]]" on [[November 13]], 2003.<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 4 Mounts and Cities">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=60891|text=Publish 4 Mounts and Cities}}</ref> This feature was removed from the game upon the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> However, it was finally restored with the "[[W:c:swg:Chapter 6 Notes for May 22 2007|Chapter 6]]" update, released on [[May 22]], [[2007]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Notes – Chapter 6: Masters of the Wild">{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=67250&month=052007|text=Publish Notes – Chapter 6: Masters of the Wild}}</ref>
